doc_description: Product catalog and company information for Gorilla Sheds.

structure.title: About Gorilla Sheds
structure.text: OUR STORY. Strength like no other Our Story Rugged, reliable, and ready for anything A Gorilla Shed is engineered for unparalleled strength. Fortified construction methods and premium grade lumber, chosen specifically for its higher bending strength, compressive strength and shear strength, lead to sheds unlike anything else. You can’t make the best sheds in the world with low grade materials. We use only the strongest, premium grade lumber from right here in America. Our sheds are built like a house, so they last like one. MADE IN THE USA with pride in Monroe, MI INNOVATION GROUNDED IN STRENGTH We’re changing the shed game every day. Better than yesterday is our motto. Beating the competition is easy. Our daily goal is beating ourselves. The best is made with the best Built to Last Our experienced installers know the drill. And the nail gun. And the tape measure. And so on and so on. Licensed and trained, they provide high-quality construction and great customer service. You can’t make the best sheds in the world with low grade materials. We use only the strongest, premium grade lumber from right here in America. Our sheds are built like a house, so they last like one. OUR COLLECTIONS All Sheds All Sheds Artisan Series Peak Gorilla strength. Built without compromise. Essentials Series Durable, practical storage with built-in organization. ESCAPE SERIES Engineered for Strength. Built for fun. All Sheds Purchase Installation How It Works Order Finalize your order and purchase at a Costco store. Schedule We contact you within 3-5 business days to schedule installation. We Deliver & Install We deliver your new shed and professionally install it Learn More Learn More

structure.title: Frequently Asked Questions
structure.summary: Common questions about sheds, ordering, and delivery.
structure.text: Installation Can you install my shed? Yes, installation is included with purchase. Can I get a shed installed if I live in Florida? No, we do not install sheds in Florida. To meet permit requirements, Florida sheds require heavy-duty, DBPR-compliant steel doors and hurricane hardware (H-clips, earth anchors, rafter ties, etc.), and we are not equipped to provide these installations. Do I need to call to schedule my shed install? A Gorilla Shed representative will contact you within 3-5 business days of your purchase date to review your order and schedule installation. The representative will also confirm your shingle color, optional paint color and any accessories at this time. What is the standard lead time for installation? 3-6 weeks from purchase. Do I need to be home for my shed installation? A person at least 18 years of age will need to be present at the time of installation. You do not need to be home once the installation process has begun, but you should be home at completion for a walk through and to sign the certificate of completion. How long will installation take? On-site installation for most sheds can be completed within one or two days. Your installer will arrive with the wood pre-cut and pre-primed, minimizing disruption to your day and your landscape. Larger and/or more complex sheds will require additional days, yet still provide minimal disruption. Timing also varies based on location, leveling, and carry time at the assembly site. Load capacity What are the floor load capacities? Our sheds meet or exceed 40 pounds per square foot. What is the wind and/or snow load capacity of my shed? Our sheds have been designed and engineered to meet approximately 90 M.P.H. wind speeds and between 20 and 30 pounds of ground snow load depending on the shed model. What if I need to cancel or add/delete an option from my order? Contact us at 888-827-9056. We will communicate your refund to Costco who can process your refund when you return to the warehouse. To add an item, we will provide you a new order form that you take to the closest warehouse to process your purchase. What type of warranty do my products carry? There is a 15-year material warranty on Gorilla sheds and a 1-year warranty on labor. Can you tear down and haul away my old, existing, shed? The Member is responsible for removal prior to your scheduled delivery date. This is only required if the new Gorilla Shed is to be assembled in the same location. How do I return or cancel my order? If you wish to return or cancel an order, please reach out to Costco directly. Foundation Do I need to do anything to prepare my yard for installation ? The assembly site should be level to within 6 inches; installers will not excavate the site The area will need to have 3 feet of unobstructed space on all 4 sides and above, free of branches, bushes, power lines, etc. Electricity will need to be available within 150 feet of the build itself If you are having your shed built on a concrete slab, please contact Gorilla Sheds for exact dimensions and allow 7 days for curing Optional leveling blocks are available….see accessories in Gorilla Shed brochure Do I need leveling blocks? Leveling blocks are not included with the purchase. Leveling blocks are not required in all states/counties, but the member should check his/her local requirements. Your building will be built on 4x4 pressure-treated runners. We will use treated leveling materials and shingle shims to level up the floor prior to installing the shed. If your ground is out of level greater than 6 inches, leveling blocks will be needed. Permits Will I need to obtain a building permit prior to my shed installation? You should check with your local Building Authority and Homeowners Association prior to installation to make sure your shed is compliant with all codes, easements and setbacks. Paint caulking Is painting included with my purchase? Painting is not included with purchase and is the homeowner’s responsibility. Gorilla sheds are built using pre-primed siding. Manufacturer requires the use of 100% acrylic latex paint. All exterior horizontal and vertical joints must be painted. Doors should be painted on all 6 sides including front, back, and all four edges. Painting your shed to match your home often meets HOA requirements. Is caulking included with my purchase? Caulking is the homeowner’s responsibility. Like your home, your shed should becaulked before painting. Use paintablecaulkon all horizontal and vertical joints, seams, and gaps. How soon do I need to caulk and paint my shed? Your shed should be caulked and painted within 30 days after installation. Check with your Homeowners Association to ensure compliance with architectural codes. Is the shed sealed to prevent water from entering? Our sheds are manufactured with the upmost precision to ensure every building meets our engineering standards. Once your shed is installed, be sure to caulk all remaining joints besides those critical joints already caulked by Gorilla Sheds as a Member Exclusive. Following these simple steps will prevent water from entering your shed.

structure.title: Shed Installation Process
structure.summary: Post-sale installation service details and requirements.
structure.text: Home Shed Installation Process Shed Installation Process Scheduling After placing your order, you will be contacted within 1-2 business days to confirm your order. Site Prep While we are prepared to do most of the work, we do ask for a few things to be completed prior to arrival. Unless you live in an area where professional contractors are required to pull the permits, members can pull their own building permits. We can provide the drawings to assist with this. Choose a build site that is free from trees, shrubs, or other debris. Ensure that the build site is level within 6 inches. Your installer will level up to 6 inches at no additional charge. If your site is out of level by 6 inches but is under 18 inches, we offer a leveling package for an additional charge. Our sheds are installed on-site. We require a 3 foot wide clear path to the building site and 3 foot clearance around and above the building site. You’ll need to provide access to electricity within 150 feet of the unit. If this is not possible, you will be charged a $100 generator fee. Day of Delivery You’ll be contacted the morning of the scheduled installation and delivery date. An installer will review the work order before installation begins. On-site installation for most sheds can be completed within one or two days. Your installer will arrive with the wood pre-cut and pre-primed, minimizing disruption to your day and your landscape. Larger and/or more complex sheds will require additional days, yet still provide minimal disruption. Your installer will review your structure with you before departing. Any final questions you have can also be answered at this time. Maintenance Painting your shed is essential to extending the life of your shed. To maintain the shed’s warranty, you must paint it within 30 days of installation. Our sheds do not come painted, but the exterior walls are factory-primed and ready for you to paint. Like your home, your new shed will require occasional maintenance to ensure many years of use and a valid warranty. In addition to re-painting every few years, you should perform other routine maintenance: - Keep all grass and vegetation trimmed around the entire perimeter of the shed. - Do not mound soil or mulch against the siding. - Do not stack anything against the exterior of your building, such as firewood. - Locking doorknobs or levers should be sprayed with silicone or other lubricants to maintain the locking mechanism and prevent freezing in cold climates. - Do not let sprinklers spray your building.
